title: [Test Improver] Monthly Activity 2026-03
body:
🤖 *Test Improver here - I'm an automated AI assistant focused on improving tests for this repository.*

## Activity for March 2026

## Suggested Actions for Maintainer

* [ ] **Merge PR** #167: Fix agent PR build failures (add CLAUDE.md + missing .meta files) — prerequisite for CI to pass on other PRs — [Review](https://github.com/norrietaylor/tt2/pull/167)
* [ ] **Review PR** #149: Unity Test Framework infrastructure (assembly defs + placeholder test) — [Review](https://github.com/norrietaylor/tt2/pull/149)
* [ ] **Review PR** #150: EditMode unit tests for LevelManager state machine — [Review](https://github.com/norrietaylor/tt2/pull/150)
* [ ] **Create PR** from branch `claude/issue-145-20260304-0334`: 13 ScoreManager EditMode tests — [Create PR](https://github.com/norrietaylor/tt2/compare/main...claude/issue-145-20260304-0334?quick_pull=1)
* [ ] **Create PR** from branch `claude/issue-146-20260304-0334`: 10 PlayerHealth EditMode tests — [Create PR](https://github.com/norrietaylor/tt2/compare/main...claude/issue-146-20260304-0334?quick_pull=1)
* [ ] **Close issue** #62: Test infrastructure addressed by PRs #149/#150 once they merge — [View](https://github.com/norrietaylor/tt2/issues/62)

## Maintainer Priorities

No specific priorities communicated yet.

## Testing Opportunities Backlog

1. **ScoreManager tests** — branch ready (`claude/issue-145-20260304-0334`), needs PR
2. **PlayerHealth tests** — branch ready (`claude/issue-146-20260304-0334`), needs PR
3. **Enemy state machine tests** — `EnemyBase`/`EnemyStateMachine` on main; state transitions are prime unit test candidates
4. **CI test runner** — add `game-ci/unity-test-runner@v4` job so tests run automatically on every PR
5. **Collectibles (`Coin`, `RobotPart`, `Collectible`)** — collection events and counter updates once infrastructure lands
6. **`IDamageable`/`ICollectible` contract tests** — interface conformance tests

## Discovered Commands

- **Build**: `game-ci/unity-builder@v4` via `.github/workflows/unity-build.yml` (requires UNITY_LICENSE, UNITY_EMAIL, UNITY_PASSWORD secrets)
- **Tests (local)**: Window → General → Test Runner → EditMode tab → Run All
- **Tests (CI)**: `game-ci/unity-test-runner@v4` — **not yet configured** (Unity Test Framework `1.1.33` is in packages)
- **Test assemblies**: Being added via PR #149 (`TT2.Core.asmdef` + `TT2.Tests.EditMode.asmdef`)

## Run History

### 2026-03-04 20:04 UTC - [Run](https://github.com/norrietaylor/tt2/actions/runs/22686899085)
- 💬 Commented on #62: Status update — PRs #149/#150 address the infrastructure request; path to closure outlined
- 📋 Closed February monthly summary (#14); created this March summary
- 🔍 Noted Claude Code branches ready for #145 (ScoreManager) and #146 (PlayerHealth) — PRs not yet created
